questions.reviewPearl: MDD requires 5 of 9 SIGECAPS for at least 2 weeks.
questions.stem: A 28-year-old woman presents with 3 weeks of low mood, fatigue, insomnia, and feelings of worthlessness. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis?

explanationSections.heading: Correct Answer Explanation
body: Patient meets DSM-5 criteria with 5+ SIGECAPS for 2 weeks.

explanationSections.heading: Incorrect Answer Explanation
body: A. Adjustment disorder requires an identifiable stressor within 3 months.
E. Grief is not a disorder.

explanationSections.heading: Clinical Pearl
body: MDD requires 5 of 9 SIGECAPS for at least 2 weeks.
